creator: Calvin Kang | cooklikeimbook ✌🏻
source_text:
don’t be like me & use a bigger bowl to mix everything

gochujang alfredo pasta

Korean/Italian fusion but higher in protein, less greasy, delicious, has a small kick, garlicy….just make it. 

Makes 5 Meal Preps Per Meal Prep: 676 Calories | 63g Protein | 13g Fat | 77g Carbs

Ingredients:
448g (16oz) fettuccine pasta
500g fat free cottage cheese
200g Fat Free Fairlife milk- I forgot to record this in the video
25-30g Gochujang
20g Garlic paste or 6-8 garlic cloves
70g Parmesan Reagiano
Parsley
Black pepper
Pinch of salt- for your sauce
800g 96/4 lean ground beef- seasoned with salt, black pepper, and tossed in spinach

Tip: when microwaving, add in some water and itll mix so much better and saucier

Tip 2: DO NOT mix hot pasta or hot water into the sauce. It will curd up and not mix well. DO NOT heat the sauce in a pan either. 

Tip 3: if you use regular Parmesan instead of Parmesan reagianno, it’s not gonna be as good but itll still be amazing

#pasta #newyear #mealprep #healthy #fitness #viral #cottagecheese #recipe #easyrecipes #dinnerideas #highprotein #koreanfood #gochujang #chicken #beef #spinach
